---
title: "MLCore Widget"
description: "Qt widget for interactive supervised and unsupervised ML workflows"
---

## Overview

`MLCore_Widget` (`src/WhiskerToolbox/MLCore_Widget/`) is a Qt6 widget providing an interactive GUI for machine learning workflows. It exposes the `MLCore` library's classification, clustering, and dimensionality reduction pipelines through a tab-based interface with panel-per-step layout.

## Architecture

The widget follows the **self-contained tool widget** pattern:

- Single widget (no view/properties split)
- Zone::Right placement as a tabbed panel
- EditorState-backed serializable configuration
- Background pipeline execution via `QThread`

```
MLCore_Widget/
├── MLCoreWidget.hpp/.cpp                    # Top-level tab widget
├── MLCoreWidgetRegistration.hpp/.cpp        # EditorRegistry registration
├── Core/
│   ├── MLCoreWidgetState.hpp/.cpp           # EditorState subclass
│   └── MLCoreWidgetStateData.hpp            # reflect-cpp POD state
└── UI/
    ├── FeatureSelectionPanel/
    │   └── FeatureSelectionPanel.hpp/.cpp/.ui   # Feature tensor selection
    ├── RegionSelectionPanel/
    │   └── RegionSelectionPanel.hpp/.cpp/.ui    # Training/prediction region
    ├── LabelConfigPanel/
    │   └── LabelConfigPanel.hpp/.cpp/.ui        # Label source configuration
    ├── ModelConfigPanel/
    │   └── ModelConfigPanel.hpp/.cpp/.ui        # Algorithm & parameter selection
    ├── PredictionPanel/
    │   └── PredictionPanel.hpp/.cpp/.ui         # Prediction region & output config
    ├── ResultsPanel/
    │   └── ResultsPanel.hpp/.cpp/.ui            # Classification results display
    ├── ClusteringPanel/
    │   └── ClusteringPanel.hpp/.cpp/.ui         # Clustering data & algorithm config
    ├── ClusterOutputPanel/
    │   └── ClusterOutputPanel.hpp/.cpp/.ui      # Clustering results display
    └── DimReductionPanel/
        └── DimReductionPanel.hpp/.cpp/.ui       # Dim reduction config & results
```

### Dependencies

```
MLCore_Widget
├── Qt6::Widgets, Qt6::Core, Qt6::Gui
├── EditorState (public)
├── MLCore (private)
├── DataManager (private)
├── GroupManagementWidget (private — for GroupManager color integration)
└── reflectcpp (state serialization)
```

## Widget State

`MLCoreWidgetStateData` holds all persistent configuration as a reflect-cpp POD struct:

### Classification State

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `feature_tensor_key` | `string` | DataManager key for TensorData features |
| `training_region_key` | `string` | DigitalIntervalSeries key for training region |
| `prediction_region_key` | `string` | DigitalIntervalSeries key for prediction region |
| `label_source_type` | `string` | `"intervals"`, `"groups"`, or `"entity_groups"` |
| `label_interval_key` | `string` | Interval series key (interval mode) |
| `label_positive_class_name` | `string` | Positive class name (interval mode) |
| `label_negative_class_name` | `string` | Negative class name (interval mode) |
| `label_group_ids` | `vector<uint64_t>` | Group IDs (group modes) |
| `label_data_key` | `string` | Data key (entity_groups mode) |
| `selected_model_name` | `string` | Registry model name |
| `model_parameters_json` | `string` | Serialized model parameters |
| `balancing_enabled` | `bool` | Class balancing toggle |
| `balancing_strategy` | `string` | `"subsample"` or `"oversample"` |
| `balancing_max_ratio` | `double` | Majority-to-minority ratio |
| `output_prefix` | `string` | Prefix for output data keys |
| `probability_threshold` | `double` | Binary classification threshold |
| `output_probabilities` | `bool` | Write probability AnalogTimeSeries |
| `output_predictions` | `bool` | Write prediction DigitalIntervalSeries |

### Clustering State

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `clustering_tensor_key` | `string` | TensorData key for clustering features |
| `clustering_model_name` | `string` | Clustering algorithm name |
| `clustering_output_prefix` | `string` | Output prefix (e.g., `"Cluster:"`) |
| `clustering_write_intervals` | `bool` | Write cluster intervals |
| `clustering_write_probabilities` | `bool` | Write soft probabilities (GMM) |
| `clustering_zscore_normalize` | `bool` | Z-score normalize before clustering |

### Dim Reduction State

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `dim_reduction_tensor_key` | `string` | TensorData key for dim reduction |
| `dim_reduction_model_name` | `string` | Algorithm name (default: `"PCA"`) |
| `dim_reduction_output_key` | `string` | Output TensorData key (default: `"reduced"`) |
| `dim_reduction_n_components` | `int` | Number of output components (default: 2) |
| `dim_reduction_scale` | `bool` | Scale features before reduction (default: true) |
| `dim_reduction_zscore_normalize` | `bool` | Z-score normalize before reduction (default: false) |
| `dim_reduction_supervised` | `bool` | Supervised mode toggle (default: false) |
| `dim_reduction_label_source_type` | `string` | `"intervals"`, `"groups"`, `"entity_groups"`, or `"events"` |
| `dim_reduction_label_interval_key` | `string` | Interval series key (interval mode) |
| `dim_reduction_label_positive_class` | `string` | Positive class name (interval mode, default: `"Inside"`) |
| `dim_reduction_label_negative_class` | `string` | Negative class name (interval mode, default: `"Outside"`) |
| `dim_reduction_label_event_key` | `string` | Event series key (events mode) |
| `dim_reduction_label_group_ids` | `vector<uint64_t>` | Group IDs (group modes) |
| `dim_reduction_label_data_key` | `string` | Data key (entity_groups mode) |

### UI State

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `active_tab` | `int` | Active workflow tab (0=classification, 1=clustering, 2=dim reduction) |

## Classification Tab

### Panel Layout

```
┌─── Features ──────────────────────────────────┐
│ Feature Tensor: [combo ▼]  shape, columns     │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─── Training Region ──────────────────────────┐
│ Interval Series: [combo ▼]  frame count       │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─── Labels ───────────────────────────────────┐
│ Source: ○ Intervals  ● Groups  ○ Entity Groups│
│ (dynamic form based on selection)             │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─── Model ────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Task: [combo ▼]  Algorithm: [combo ▼]         │
│ Parameters: (stacked per-model widgets)       │
│ Balancing: ☐ Enabled  Strategy  Ratio         │
│ [Train Model]                                 │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─── Prediction ───────────────────────────────┐
│ Region: [combo ▼]  ☐ All frames               │
│ Threshold: [slider/spinbox]                   │
│ ☐ Probabilities  ☐ Predictions                │
│ [Predict]                                     │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─── Results ──────────────────────────────────┐
│ Metrics display, confusion matrix,            │
│ clickable output data keys                    │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Sub-Panels

| Panel | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `FeatureSelectionPanel` | Combo box listing `TensorData` keys. Shows column names, row count, row type, time frame info. |
| `RegionSelectionPanel` | Combo box for `DigitalIntervalSeries` keys. Shows frame count. "All frames" checkbox. |
| `LabelConfigPanel` | Radio buttons for label source. Dynamic stacked form per mode. Class name editing. |
| `ModelConfigPanel` | Task type → model filter. Stacked parameter widgets per model. HMM page includes diagonal covariance checkbox. Class balancing config. Train button. |
| `PredictionPanel` | Prediction region selection. Threshold slider + spinbox. Output type checkboxes. Constrained decoding checkbox (visible only for sequence models). Predict button. |
| `ResultsPanel` | Displays `ClassificationPipelineResult`. Metrics, confusion matrix, clickable output keys. |

## Clustering Tab

### Panel Layout

```
┌─── Data Source ──────────────────────────────┐
│ TensorData: [combo ▼]  shape, columns, type   │
│ ☐ Z-score normalize                          │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─── Algorithm ────────────────────────────────┐
│ [combo ▼]  (per-algorithm parameters)         │
│ Output prefix: [text]                         │
│ ☐ Write intervals  ☐ Write probabilities      │
│ [Fit & Assign]                                │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─── Output ───────────────────────────────────┐
│ Cluster table, noise info, created keys       │
│ Color swatches from GroupManager              │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Sub-Panels

| Panel | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `ClusteringPanel` | TensorData selection, algorithm combo filtered to `MLTaskType::Clustering`, per-algorithm parameter stack, normalization option, output config. |
| `ClusterOutputPanel` | Algorithm summary, cluster assignment table with counts and fractions, noise point info, clickable output keys with color swatches. |

## Dim Reduction Tab

### Panel Layout

The Dim Reduction tab supports both unsupervised (PCA, t-SNE, Robust PCA) and supervised (Logit Projection) modes, controlled by radio buttons at the top.

#### Unsupervised Mode (default)

```
┌─── Mode ─────────────────────────────────────┐
│ ● Unsupervised  ○ Supervised                  │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─── Data Source ──────────────────────────────┐
│ TensorData: [combo ▼]  shape info label       │
│ ☐ Z-score normalize                          │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─── Algorithm ────────────────────────────────┐
│ Algorithm: [combo ▼]  Components: [spinbox]   │
│ ☐ Scale features                              │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─── Output ───────────────────────────────────┐
│ Output key: [text]                            │
│ [Run Reduction]                               │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─── Results ──────────────────────────────────┐
│ Observations, features, dropped rows          │
│ Explained variance per component              │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

#### Supervised Mode

When "Supervised" is selected, the algorithm list switches to `MLTaskType::SupervisedDimensionalityReduction` (Logit Projection) and a Labels section appears for configuring label assembly.

```
┌─── Mode ─────────────────────────────────────┐
│ ○ Unsupervised  ● Supervised                  │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─── Data Source ──────────────────────────────┐
│ TensorData: [combo ▼]  shape info label       │
│ ☐ Z-score normalize                          │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─── Algorithm ────────────────────────────────┐
│ Algorithm: [combo ▼]  Components: [spinbox]   │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─── Labels ───────────────────────────────────┐
│ Source: [combo ▼ Interval Series]             │
│   Interval Key: [combo ▼]                     │
│   Positive class: [text]  Negative: [text]    │
│  ── OR ──                                     │
│ Source: [combo ▼ Entity Groups]               │
│   Group: [combo ▼] [+] [-]                    │
│   Class 0: "Contact" (50 entities)            │
│   Class 1: "No Contact" (50 entities)         │
│  ── OR ──                                     │
│ Source: [combo ▼ Event Series]                │
│   Event Key: [combo ▼]                        │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─── Output ───────────────────────────────────┐
│ Output key: [text]                            │
│ [Run Reduction]                               │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─── Results ──────────────────────────────────┐
│ Total observations, training observations,    │
│ features, output dims, dropped rows,          │
│ unlabeled count, classes, class names          │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Sub-Panel

| Panel | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `DimReductionPanel` | TensorData selection, mode toggle (unsupervised/supervised), algorithm combo filtered by task type, n_components spinbox, scale/z-score checkboxes, label source configuration (supervised mode), output key, run button. Shows explained variance ratio per component (unsupervised) or class-specific training stats (supervised) after completion. |

### Label Source Configuration (Supervised Mode)

The supervised label configuration reuses the same 4 label assembly modes as the Classification tab's `LabelConfigPanel`, presented through a `QStackedWidget` controlled by the label source combo box:

| Mode | Config Widgets |
|---|---|
| Interval Series | Interval key combo, positive/negative class name text fields |
| Entity Groups | Group selection combo + Add/Remove buttons, class assignment list |
| Data Entity Groups | Data key combo, group selection combo + Add/Remove buttons |
| Event Series | Event key combo |

### Auto-Focus

After a successful dim reduction, the output TensorData key is broadcast via `SelectionContext::setDataFocus()`. This causes `DataFocusAware` widgets (ScatterPlotWidget, DataInspector, etc.) to update automatically.

## Pipeline Execution

All three pipelines (four including supervised dim reduction) run asynchronously in a `QThread` background worker:

1. UI panels are disabled during execution
2. Progress callback updates a status label and indeterminate progress bar
3. On completion, results are displayed in the output panel
4. On failure, an error message is shown
5. Deferred writes are committed on the main thread for thread safety

The `_runPipelineAsync()` / `_runClusteringPipelineAsync()` / `_runDimReductionPipelineAsync()` / `_runSupervisedDimReductionPipelineAsync()` methods assemble the config from panel state, spawn a worker thread, and connect completion signals.

## SelectionContext Integration

`MLCoreWidget` inherits the `DataFocusAware` mixin for bidirectional awareness:

### Incoming

When another widget focuses a `TensorData` key via `SelectionContext`, the `FeatureSelectionPanel` auto-selects it. This lets users click a tensor in DataInspector and have it appear in ML Workflow.

### Outgoing

- Clicking an output data key in `ResultsPanel` or `ClusterOutputPanel` calls `SelectionContext::setDataFocus` so other widgets (DataViewer, DataInspector) navigate to that output.
- Clicking a putative group entry calls `SelectionContext::setSelectedEntities()` to highlight the group's entities across all widgets.

## GroupManager Integration

`GroupManager*` is passed from `MainWindow` through registration:

- **Auto-assigned colors**: GroupManager's observer callback detects groups created by `PredictionWriter` and assigns palette colors. `GroupManagementWidget` automatically adds rows.
- **Color swatches**: `ClusterOutputPanel` and `ResultsPanel` display group color icons via QPixmap swatches from GroupManager.
- **Entity selection**: Clicking a putative group entry retrieves its entities and broadcasts selection.

## Registration

Registered via `MLCoreWidgetRegistration` with:

- **Type ID**: `"MLCoreWidget"`
- **Menu path**: View/Analysis
- **Zone**: Right
- **Single instance**: `allow_multiple = false`
- Receives `GroupManager*` from `MainWindow`

### ContextAction: `mlcore.cluster_tensor`

`MLCoreWidgetRegistration` registers a `ContextAction` with `action_id = "mlcore.cluster_tensor"`:

- **Applicability**: The currently focused data key (via `SelectionContext::currentDataKey()`) must exist as a `TensorData` key in `DataManager`
- **Execute**: Sets the clustering tensor key to the focused data key, switches the active tab to the Clustering tab (`setActiveTab(1)`), and opens the ML Workflow widget

This action is consumed by `ScatterPlotWidget`'s context menu — when a user right-clicks on a scatter plot backed by `TensorData`, the "Cluster with ML Workflow" option appears. The "Cluster Selection..." action in `ScatterPlotOpenGLWidget` also programmatically triggers this action after creating a filtered subset of selected points. See the [ScatterPlotWidget documentation](../ui/Plots/ScatterPlotWidget/index.qmd#contextaction-integration) for the full workflow.
